definitions: A polite expression used to apologize for arriving at a place or contacting someone unexpectedly and without a prior invitation.
examples: I hate to turn up out of the blue, uninvited, but I really needed to talk to you.
She said, 'I hate to turn up out of the blue, uninvited,' as she stood at his front door.
lemma: hate to turn up out of the blue, uninvited
source: I hate to turn up out of the blue, uninvited
